message:
test(bd-2k72): add task lifecycle edge-case and state transition tests

Add 28 new tests to tasks.rs covering:
- can_transition: all valid/invalid state transition pairs
- transition_state: identity transition (same state returns true)
- Default/Debug/into_shared: construction variants and output format
- get_info/get_result: nonexistent task returns None, pending has no result
- is_cancel_requested: nonexistent and pre-cancel states
- update_progress: ignored on pending and completed tasks
- complete_task/fail_task: nonexistent task does not panic
- cancel: nonexistent returns error, pending task cancellable,
  default reason text
- task ID sequencing: IDs are unique and prefixed
- start_task: nonexistent and already-running errors
- cleanup_completed: removes old, keeps active and recent tasks
- submit: with and without params
- fail_task: verifies error result fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
